lines.english: Lesson 36
lines.chinese: 第36课
lines.raw: Lesson 36 | 第36课

lines.english: A chance in a million
lines.chinese: 百万分之一的机遇
lines.raw: A chance in a million | 百万分之一的机遇

lines.english: What was the chance in a million?
lines.chinese: 这百万分之一的机遇是什么呢？
lines.raw: What was the chance in a million? | 这百万分之一的机遇是什么呢？

lines.english: We are less credulous than we used to be.
lines.chinese: 我们不像以前那样轻信了。
lines.raw: We are less credulous than we used to be. | 我们不像以前那样轻信了。

lines.english: In the nineteenth century, a novelist would bring his story to a conclusion
lines.chinese: 在19世纪，小说家在故事的结尾
lines.raw: In the nineteenth century, a novelist would bring his story to a conclusion | 在19世纪，小说家在故事的结尾

lines.english: by presenting his readers with a series of coincidences--most of them wildly improbable.
lines.chinese: 会给读者安排一连串的巧合——其中大部分都是极不可能发生的。
lines.raw: by presenting his readers with a series of coincidences--most of them wildly improbable. | 会给读者安排一连串的巧合——其中大部分都是极不可能发生的。

lines.english: Readers happily accepted the fact that an obscure maidservant was really the hero's mother.
lines.chinese: 读者们欣然接受一个默默无闻的女仆竟然是主人公的母亲这一事实。
lines.raw: Readers happily accepted the fact that an obscure maidservant was really the hero's mother. | 读者们欣然接受一个默默无闻的女仆竟然是主人公的母亲这一事实。

lines.english: A long-lost brother, who was presumed dead, was really alive all the time
lines.chinese: 一个被认为已死去的失散多年的兄弟，实际上一直活着，
lines.raw: A long-lost brother, who was presumed dead, was really alive all the time | 一个被认为已死去的失散多年的兄弟，实际上一直活着，

lines.english: and wickedly plotting to bring about the hero's downfall. And so on.
lines.chinese: 并且阴险地策划着让主人公垮台。诸如此类。
lines.raw: and wickedly plotting to bring about the hero's downfall. And so on. | 并且阴险地策划着让主人公垮台。诸如此类。

lines.english: Modern readers would find such naive solutions totally unacceptable.
lines.chinese: 现代读者会觉得这种天真的结局完全不能接受。
lines.raw: Modern readers would find such naive solutions totally unacceptable. | 现代读者会觉得这种天真的结局完全不能接受。

lines.english: Yet, in real life, circumstances do sometimes conspire to bring about coincidences which anyone but a nineteenth century novelist would find incredible.
lines.chinese: 然而，在现实生活中，情况有时确实会凑巧地导致巧合的发生，除了19世纪的小说家，其他任何人都觉得不可思议。
lines.raw: Yet, in real life, circumstances do sometimes conspire to bring about coincidences which anyone but a nineteenth century novelist would find incredible. | 然而，在现实生活中，情况有时确实会凑巧地导致巧合的发生，除了19世纪的小说家，其他任何人都觉得不可思议。

lines.english: When I was a boy, my grandfather told me how a German taxi driver, Franz Bussman,
lines.chinese: 我小时候，祖父给我讲了一个德国出租车司机弗朗兹·布斯曼的故事，
lines.raw: When I was a boy, my grandfather told me how a German taxi driver, Franz Bussman, | 我小时候，祖父给我讲了一个德国出租车司机弗朗兹·布斯曼的故事，

lines.english: found a brother who was thought to have been killed twenty years before.
lines.chinese: 他找到了一个被认为在20年前阵亡的兄弟。
lines.raw: found a brother who was thought to have been killed twenty years before. | 他找到了一个被认为在20年前阵亡的兄弟。

lines.english: While on a walking tour with his wife, he stopped to talk to a workman.
lines.chinese: 在和妻子徒步旅行时，他停下来和一名工人交谈。
lines.raw: While on a walking tour with his wife, he stopped to talk to a workman. | 在和妻子徒步旅行时，他停下来和一名工人交谈。

lines.english: After they had gone on, Mrs. Bussman commented on the workman's close resemblance to her husband
lines.chinese: 他们继续前行后，布斯曼夫人评论说那个工人长得很像她丈夫，
lines.raw: After they had gone on, Mrs. Bussman commented on the workman's close resemblance to her husband | 他们继续前行后，布斯曼夫人评论说那个工人长得很像她丈夫，

lines.english: and even suggested that he might be his brother.
lines.chinese: 甚至猜测他可能是她丈夫的兄弟。
lines.raw: and even suggested that he might be his brother. | 甚至猜测他可能是她丈夫的兄弟。

lines.english: Franz poured scorn on the idea,
lines.chinese: 弗朗兹对这个想法嗤之以鼻，
lines.raw: Franz poured scorn on the idea, | 弗朗兹对这个想法嗤之以鼻，

lines.english: pointing out that his brother had been killed in action during the war.
lines.chinese: 指出他兄弟在战争中阵亡了。
lines.raw: pointing out that his brother had been killed in action during the war. | 指出他兄弟在战争中阵亡了。

lines.english: Though Mrs. Bussman was fully acquainted with this story,
lines.chinese: 尽管布斯曼夫人完全了解这个故事，
lines.raw: Though Mrs. Bussman was fully acquainted with this story, | 尽管布斯曼夫人完全了解这个故事，

lines.english: she thought that there was a chance in a million that she might be right.
lines.chinese: 她觉得她有可能说对了，尽管几率是百万分之一。
lines.raw: she thought that there was a chance in a million that she might be right. | 她觉得她有可能说对了，尽管几率是百万分之一。

lines.english: A few days later, she sent a boy to the workman to ask him if his name was Hans Bussman.
lines.chinese: 几天后，她派了一个男孩去问那个工人，他是否叫汉斯·布斯曼。
lines.raw: A few days later, she sent a boy to the workman to ask him if his name was Hans Bussman. | 几天后，她派了一个男孩去问那个工人，他是否叫汉斯·布斯曼。

lines.english: Needless to say, the man's name was Hans Bussman and he really was Franz's long-lost brother.
lines.chinese: 不用说，那个人的名字就是汉斯·布斯曼，他确实是弗朗兹失散多年的兄弟。
lines.raw: Needless to say, the man's name was Hans Bussman and he really was Franz's long-lost brother. | 不用说，那个人的名字就是汉斯·布斯曼，他确实是弗朗兹失散多年的兄弟。

lines.english: When the brothers were reunited,
lines.chinese: 兄弟俩团聚后，
lines.raw: When the brothers were reunited, | 兄弟俩团聚后，

lines.english: Hans explained how it was that he was still alive.
lines.chinese: 汉斯解释了他为什么还活着。
lines.raw: Hans explained how it was that he was still alive. | 汉斯解释了他为什么还活着。

lines.english: After having been wounded towards the end of the war,
lines.chinese: 在战争快结束时受伤后，
lines.raw: After having been wounded towards the end of the war, | 在战争快结束时受伤后，

lines.english: he had been sent to hospital and was separated from his unit.
lines.chinese: 他被送往医院，与部队失散了。
lines.raw: he had been sent to hospital and was separated from his unit. | 他被送往医院，与部队失散了。

lines.english: The hospital had been bombed and Hans had made his way back into Western Germany on foot.
lines.chinese: 医院被轰炸了，汉斯徒步回到了西德。
lines.raw: The hospital had been bombed and Hans had made his way back into Western Germany on foot. | 医院被轰炸了，汉斯徒步回到了西德。

lines.english: Meanwhile, his unit was lost and all records of him had been destroyed.
lines.chinese: 同时，他的部队失散了，所有关于他的记录都被销毁了。
lines.raw: Meanwhile, his unit was lost and all records of him had been destroyed. | 同时，他的部队失散了，所有关于他的记录都被销毁了。

lines.english: Hans returned to his family home, but the house had been bombed
lines.chinese: 汉斯回到了他的老家，但是房子被炸毁了，
lines.raw: Hans returned to his family home, but the house had been bombed | 汉斯回到了他的老家，但是房子被炸毁了，

lines.english: and no one in the neighbourhood knew what had become of the inhabitants.
lines.chinese: 邻居们也不知道住户们怎么样了。
lines.raw: and no one in the neighbourhood knew what had become of the inhabitants. | 邻居们也不知道住户们怎么样了。

lines.english: Assuming that his family had been killed during an air raid,
lines.chinese: 以为他的家人在空袭中丧生，
lines.raw: Assuming that his family had been killed during an air raid, | 以为他的家人在空袭中丧生，

lines.english: Hans settled down in a village fifty miles away where he had remained ever since.
lines.chinese: 汉斯在一个五十英里外的小村庄安顿下来，自此一直住在那里。
lines.raw: Hans settled down in a village fifty miles away where he had remained ever since. | 汉斯在一个五十英里外的小村庄安顿下来，自此一直住在那里。
